items.title: "Der Populist" KW 11 || Ausgabe 1
items.content:
Zögern, Zaudern, Zweifeln!

Quo vadis, Deutschland?

Die Stimmung im Land kippt. Vernahm man in den vergangenen Tagen noch so etwas wie Aufbruch, ja feierte man einen knappen Sieg über die USA in Südamerika beinahe wie einen weiteren Weltmeistertitel, so ist die öffentliche Wahrnehmung inzwischen deutlich gedämpfter.

Der neue Regierungsapparat scheint noch immer in der Findungsphase zu verharren und verliert sich lieber in politischen Grabenkämpfen über die Farbe der eigenen Grenzen. Dieses sumpfige Herumdoktern an Nebensächlichkeiten lässt die aktuelle Führungsriege pomadig, ja beinahe kraftlos erscheinen.

Besonders deutlich wird das nach dem Angriff Frankreichs auf das verhasste Italien. Ist man uns zuvorgekommen? Während rivalisierende Nationen auf dem großen Schachbrett entschlossen ihre Züge setzen, wirkt unser Land wie ein Bauer auf dem Abstellgleis.

Und doch gibt es auch Lichtblicke: Die Bevölkerungszahl steuert auf einen neuen Rekordwert zu. Nutzen wir diese neu gewonnene Schlagkraft endlich, um auch selbst eine tragende Rolle auf dem globalen Spielplatz zu übernehmen.

Aus dem Untergrund am 11.03.2026

items.title: Pamflet: The Anti-Wilhelmist Agenda
items.content:
The Wilhelmist Pamflet

The Dutch Government has embarked upon a Anti-Wilhelmist agenda. Favoring Scandinavian occupation over the Glorious Revolution, it has shown to betray the spirit of William III of Orange, who united the continental Netherlands and the United Kingdom in union. The quick dismissal of this union shows historic ties hold no meaning to the Dutch Government.



At the same time, the Dutch Government favors the United States, and Turkey, and with it endless wars in Venezuela, Portugal and the Balkans, over the possibility to restore an Wilhelmian era at home. Its backing of states who aggressively invade the European continent, rather than our Eastern neighbours who have grown their population in similar manners as the Dutch state, is once more a shocking betrayal of the Wilhelmian spirit.

We must implore the Dutch Government to recognize the historic ties between the Dutch State and the German State. To hold on to the ideals of the Glorious Revolution. To stop our involvement in aiding an aggressive expansionist in its objectives in other continents. Together, we can safeguard the hegemony of the European continent, and have a friendship as courteous as Wilhelmina's and Wilhelms. We can spent our resources at home, and ensure there is a strong European block. One that has recently undergone a babyboom, that can rewrite the small hickups our relationship has seen in the past.




And, more importantly, one that normalizes an Imbiss in every Dutch town, and a stroopwafel vendor at every German market.

items.title: Informationsdienst Staat & Nation | Sonderausgabe
items.content:
🇩🇪 PRESSEMITTEILUNG DER BUNDESREGIERUNG 🇩🇪

Datum: 11. März 2026
Geltungsbereich: Bundesrepublik Deutschland
Vertraulichkeitsstufe: STUFE 1 (ÖFFENTLICH)

AN DIE BÜRGERINNEN UND BÜRGER,

Nach der glorreichen Befreiung Liechtensteins von der italienischen Unterdrückung führen wir den Kampf für die Gerechtigkeit fort. Gemeinsam mit unseren französischen Brüdern treten wir an, um die italienische Willkür endgültig zu brechen.

Dieses Bündnis festigt unsere Stellung als Weltmacht endgültig. Aus Gründen der nationalen Sicherheit bleibt die volle Tragweite der strategischen Ziele bis zum glorreichen Ende des Konflikts unter Verschluss.

Es ist uns eine Ehre, Seite an Seite mit Frankreich für das gerechte Thema der Freiheit zu kämpfen. Gegen die Unterdrückung, für eine glorreiche Zukunft.

IM AUFTRAG DER STAATSFÜHRUNG

BERLIN, DEN 11. MÄRZ 2026

GEZEICHNET: MOLTI
items.author: 697c7f7d1a0bc85db39b585c

items.title: Interviewing Veterans and New Players About The Game Changing Update v0.24.0
items.content:
Table of Content:

  1. Questions asked to all players

  2. Questions asked to Veterans only

  3. Questions asked to New Users only

A new update is coming to War Era that may shift the balance between veteran players and newcomers.

Some players believe it will make the game fairer, while others worry it may reduce the value of long-term progress.

I spoke to several players from both sides of the community to hear their thoughts.

Questions Asked to All Players

Question 1:

What was your first reaction when you heard about the update?


: (Playing for 10 months)
"Me as a veteran player i was a bit mad about it when i heard. I understand that you need a system to keep the newcomers but this is total bacstab to your loyal and long playerbase."


: (Playing for 1 month)
"Honestly surprised, because i never thought that the damage skills needed nerf or anything, for me they worked as intended."


: (Playing for 9 months)
"I laughed."


:
"Happy because even if I completely disagree with the changes the game is continuously being developed and I rather him fail for trying than not do anything"


:
"It was something of - "oh no, community will not be happy about it". Because it is this kind of voices I saw first people discussing about the new change.
And I wanted to amplify that voice, because it was not the first time I saw it."


:
" "

Question 2:

Do you think nerfing older players is fair?

: (Playing for 10 months)
"This will be short answer - yes"


:(Playing for 1 months)
"For me i don't think its fair nerfing them, especially when this patch may create even more difficulties for my country Brazil to get its land back against our main enemy Uruguay"


: (Playing for 9 months)
"Absolutely not. Nerfing veterans to help new players isn't balance; it’s theft. If you care about new players, add new content — don't destroy our hard-earned progress. This “forced equality” feels like modern-day robbery."


: (Playing for 2 months)
"I dont think it's fair. To me it makes no sense that very old players will get nerfed so heavily when they are already playing for a year and they went through the hardship of leveling in the old versions of the game which were even harder. Also from an objetive point of view, the game will be completely streamlined meaning you just hit a certain level in this case 30 and starting from that you won't feel any meaningless progression. Also it will damage longevity, playera who spent a whole year playing will feel like all their hardwork and leveling won't mean anything when a player in 2 months can achieve the same results."


: (Playing for 7 months)
"I'm not sure if it is really about nerfing older players. It is more about involving community into shape of the game and how , council / moderation is percieved by the existing player community. It is about discussing with them, listening what they have to say and preparing them for what is coming!

The game is in beta, so some changes are expected. From the other side, there is already quite significant playerbase, which is involved and want to be involved in the game. There is a council, which tries to advice to make sure the balance of the game is maintained. The whole point is, that no one understands how this work, as this work is done behind the curtain! I feel that the main issue is between involved players on WarEra Discord, where a lot of influence of the game is being discussed, and the game itself, where the most information is not being propagated. Recently there were some improvements on it. made survey, published statistics on the responses. He did what the community was expecting in my opinion! This is what the community is missing. So my point was, to ensure, that community is being listened and that they understand why some changes are made and to accept it. If the decision is being made about change of the game, I think it is important to remind - it is still beta, and you've signed for it."

Question 3:

How do you think this update will change the game?

: (Playing for 10 months)
"I think it will be bad for game. It will unmotivate veterans to keep playing cos newbie can just come and deal the close to your dmg. Also its will be bad for those newcomers in future cos they will face the same issue in few months.

I dont think its healthy to unmotivate players who have been here since start.  And we arent even that much. Most players who play now started this year and they will catch up soon

Latvia new players are also good example. Alot joined in start of January and i see them doing good dmg already some even close to 1m in battle and they didnt have to go all in to archieve this. This isnt that far away what we can do.

I think the system we have now is already quite good for newcomers. Might need some improvements for sure.

I think the system we have now is already quite good for newcomers. Might need some improvements for sure. But its just stupid to try scale dmg.

It just makes all the work what veterans have done i  past months usless. I am not even talk8ng 10months old veterens even the guys who joined in sept for example.

They played for 6momnhs already and why should newcomer have the same some benefits compared to them who have invested way more time in this game. Playing longer and trying ubderstand game shouls be rewarded also."

: (Playing for 1 months)

"I do think this may be one of the biggest game changes in a update, as this will radically make new players much better at damage and decrease the total damage potential of older players, for the mid sized countries they will be the most affected"


: (Playing for 9 months)
"This update won't grow the game; it may lead to its collapse. Destroying progress is like printing money to fix a failing economy. The solution isn't forced equality but creating separate servers for newcomers. This isn't an update — it feels like modern-day robbery."


: (Playing for 2 months)
"Regarding builds, I think it will give space to new builds being discovered since armor and specially dodge were too overpowered. I like the nerfs, however the soft caps will simply make the game more number wise instead of quality wise.

For example, hypothetically speaking let's say a lvl 40 now is worth 4 level 20s, with the soft caps it will be more worth to have the 4 level 20s and also it will incentive multi accounts since they will have a higher impact"


: (Playing for 7 months)
"I like when decisions are data driven. After sent results of the simulation to me, I'm less concerned that it will really impact experienced players. I hope that conversation I started will affect how interaction with the community will be made"

Question 4:

If you could change one thing about the update, what would it be?

: (Playing for 10 months)
""


: (Playing for 1 months)
"After thinking a bit more and actually reading the update, i would say to change the equipments because now they will be even more important and because of the update expensive as they give stats that will be nerfed with the Armor in the chestplate and the Dodge in the boots, so there will be a decrease in gap from the skills part but a increase in the equipments because they will be more expensive after this as the skills get this ''mini rework'' on them and newers guys are poor because we are spending the money on steel/concrete to get the companies rolling"


: (Playing for 9 months)
"I'd replace nerfs with inclusive events for all players. Balance isn't destroying progress; it's creating content that rewards everyone. Keep the old servers intact, open new ones for newbie"


: (Playing for 2 months)
"Reverse the soft caps. Actually getting maxed out in a single skill should give you a special bonus while also being way more costly"


: (Playing for 7 months)

"How it supposed to be communicated before it will get introduced."


Veteran Player Questions

Question 1:

Do you feel like your progress is being taken away?

: (Playing for 10 months)
"This will be short answer - yes"


: (Playing for 9 months)
"Absolutely. This isn't just a nerf; it feels like an attack on the effort veteran players have put into the game. Devaluing that time could hurt the community."


: (Playing for 7 months)
"My progress? No. Not mine. But I see that others are feeling it is being taken from them. I enjoy the game as it is and however community will shape it. I know I will adapt. Recently I achieved personally what I wanted - 12 factories with 7 auto update. Now, after about 7 months of playing I think I'm ready to get involved more into fighting again. First time was when I was around lvl 15. I am member of Poland senior Staff. I am focusing on the eco aspects, I am fulfilled MoE of Poland, where I am spawning a lot of initiatives to make it interesting for our players. My recent initiative is about working on economic warfare aspects, at the same time making eco players more active and involved in the game and to support the fighters in more efficient way. How to make the game more interesting! I am involved in diplomacy and want to make friends everywhere and help the fight with those that step on our toes, and make them understand what does it mean to get involved with us - for the good, or bad - pick your side. I try to keep respect to everyone who respects me and us. But you need to earn it. You need to show your involvement. Show the effects and results of your effort.

The whole point about the game is that it can be played in a loooooot of ways. It is really your creativity that limits you on how you want to play it. And it is thanks to the community that creates this meta. It is also thanks to , because he made that game. It is thanks to mods, who help to maintain the game and the council who helps to shape the game."

Question 2:

Do you think new players deserve the advantages coming in the update?


: (Playing for 10 months)
"I have been playing for 10months. I started at first month of release. I dont think its question what they do or do not deserve. Its a game we all have same playing field..
We all veterans also started at lv1 with no economy. They already have way more benefits then we had back then, Its just logical that in this type of game where xp is limited on how much you can get each week. Older players will have more advantages and it will always will be like that
Can you also mention this guy in ven vs usa battle
""
He started 2 months ago and dealt more dmg then me a veteran of 10months "" This battle
Just to prove my point that this update will just ruin the game. And newcomers already are competative enough. Its resource game. If you save for 2 months you can deal 2m if u dont u cant

Doesnt matter if ur lv20 or lv40 i stilk need those resources. Yeh statisticaly i will deal more dmg cos of my lvl but thats part od this game they made it this way that u have xp caps each day.....
And problem wont go away with that update.
There will be new players in 6month facing same issue..."


: (Playing for 9 months)
"Everyone deserves a good start, but not at the expense of veteran effort. Helping new players by punishing veterans is unfair. The solution is new servers and inclusive events that let everyone thrive without tearing down what we built"


: (Playing for 7 months)
"Hmmm… Deserve? I feel the play on my own words here ;) and on my expectations regarding the effort. For me, it is that to use the word that someone "deserves" something, they need to show an effort.

Do they deserve the advantages? I don't know. I don't know them, to judge if they deserve it or not. I guess everyone should be treated fair and proportionally to the effort they have put. But they also need a chance to go grow and learn to be better. Help them learn and understand and like the game more. See how deep it can be. Let's make sure that the new players understand what the game is and let decide on their own, to encourage them to try it, and stay for longer.

Do they deserve that? Hell yeah! It is a lot of fun and everyone deserves that!

It is all about the definition of a success. What do you define as a success in WarEra. Wealth? Power? Damage? There is no one goal! Everyone sets the goals for themselves and go from there."

New Player Questions

Question 1:

Did you ever feel like older players had too big of an advantage?

: (Playing for 1 months)
"I do think that they do have an advantage but for me the most important one is that they can have multiple sets of equipments instead of the lv points per set, yes the points does increase their damage but so does having 2 sets of full red or yellow, but the answer isn't giving the newer players the ability to get the yellow/red sets either and that is something that i don't really know how to manage, because they got those itens because they are in the game longer than yourself, so its expected that they do have some of this because i too want to reach the point of being able to use jets and tanks to do multiple times the damage of a new account, so i would be kinda underwhelmed when its my turn to do this and i won't reach as high, so yeah its a delicate and complicated topic lol."


: (Playing for 2 months)
"Obviously an older player has an advantage which is intended that's why we play these games for the progression. If I start playing WoW, should I expect to kill the endgame boss in a week? What's the point of progression then? What I am trying to say is that, letting new players easily achieve high damage battles without any effort will remove the gratification and the satisfaction of grinding in the game. I'll give you an example, I started playing 2 months ago, I grinded the whole time and the moment I switched to attack I gave 1M in a battle. For my low level it felt really good because my grind paid off. If you make it easier the feeling of doing that damage goes away and all you are left is indifference"

Question 2:

Does this update make the game feel more fair for new players? Do you agree with it? Why or why not?

: (Playing for 1 months)

"ehh, like it does make things more ''fair'' for new players, but you are not playing this alone, even as a mercenary you will have the MUs that are high level and low level, and with the amount of xp that we gain per week, we really reach lv 20 and beyond fast, so really this will only help the really really early game, as in a month of gameplay you will be near lv 20 and well beyond you really aren't a ''super new player'' anymore, it will help you reach the gap that higher lv players do have, but you too in some time will reach the same high level and face the consequence of doing lower damage, but i guess that would be the new norm if this update does happen."


: (Playing for 2 months)
"I'm gonna be honest the game is s1t for new players but that's because there is little to do and the developer is going the wrong way. He should develop systems and activities for new players to be engaged so they have the will to become a veteran

One decent way to keep new players engaged is to add features that allow them to feel useful for their nation or group of friends. ATM, low levels feel like they are useless and cannot do shit but just grind which is what the developer should focus."

Final Thoughts — Community Reaction

Community Reactions Show a Divided Player Base

After speaking with both veterans and newer players, one thing becomes clear — the upcoming update has sparked strong opinions across the War Era community.

Some players welcome the changes as a way to reduce the gap between new and old players, while others fear it could undermine months of hard-earned progress.


This took very long, please tip to help support more articles by a Nokia. Leave a like and subscribe!

Do you have your own opinion on the update? Share your thoughts in the comments.

IF WE WANT PEOPLE TO STOP HATING ON US, CREATE BONDS, DEVELOP ALLIES & NOT JUST PEOPLE THAT DONT HATE US. AUSTRALIA, WE NEED TO DO BETTER OR ELSE OUR ALLIES WILL BECOME OUR FOES.

This also applies to most nations, if you want to strive as a nation, you have to create bonds and not be attacked and rebelled at constantly. To create a safe economy, MAKE ALLIES. If you break a bond, you will need to repay tenfold to repair it. Please consider this carefully.

From your most loyal servant,

items.title: Pateicība LV komūnai
items.content:
Labrīt, latviešu tautumeitas un tautudēli!

Aiz loga priecē pavasarīgais laiks un esmu labā noskaņojumā, un nākas secināt, ka laiks nemanot ir paskrējis un šodien svinu savu WE divu mēnešu "dzimšanas dienu". Šajā laikā ir bijis gan interesanti, gan piedzīvojumiem bagāti un pateicoties mūsu draudzīgajai komūnai - viennozīmīgi pozitīvi un jautri.


Tādēļ kā pateicību esmu nolēmis vienam(-ai) no jums uzdāvināt spēles abonementu, kas ilgst 1 mēnesi.

Lai pieteiktos, viss kas jādara, ir jāatstāj savs komentārs zem šī raksta līdz šodienas pusnaktij.

Pieteikšanās kritēriji:

  • pie spēlētāja avatara jābūt Latvijas karodziņam

  • spēlētāja īpašumā jau nav aktīva abonementa

Uzvarētāju noteikšu izlozes kārtībā.

Vēlu veiksmi! :)

Sindar
items.author: 6963de52d83cd4e381ef7251

items.title: Guide For New Players On Mobile
items.content:
First of all, welcome! As a new or returning player, there are many things that you need to daily that can easily overwhelm you.

1) War

War should not be considered for you until you get to at least lev. 35-40 (credits to Johnny Sins) or if you just wanna fight. Your main priority should be to develop yourself with economics.

2) Economy

Finish as many quests as quickly as possible to upgrade to level 7 first. Once you unlock the trade feature, look at the market. If you want to take a gamble, buy boxes. If you want to develop well, try to focus on limestone, concrete, iron and steel. This can be later used to build companies and allow people to work for you.

3)Companies

If you go to the bottom right hand side of your screen, you will see companies. Understanding how your first company works can be pretty hard. Make sure you change the resource you produce to limestone. Then simply press produce until you can't work for yourself anymore. You will then create the item out of thin air. The thing that you just used to produce is called entrepreneurship. You generate it to max every 10h, so remember to keep checking it.

If you want to work for someone, simply look for a job. You want the highest paying one at the beginning stage. Similar to working for yourself, you use energy to work. After you click work, you automatically get some money for your hard work! You can also keep track of entrepreneurship and energy centered at the top of your screen.

4) Inventory

If you go to you bottom left hand side, you will see inventory. In you inventory, you will see heaps of stuff. Crates, food, stuff you produce like iron and weapons. You can keep track of the four key resources we talked about earlier. If you gambled for crates, here is where you open them.

For your weapons, equip only common (grey) rarities. If you get green, blue, purple, yellow or red, I HIGHLY RECOMMEND you sell them at the market at a decent price. You can check prices that others are selling and adjust to it.

5) Market

Located on the bottom tab near companies, you will see the market. You can only sell and buy stuff after you reach level 7. You can sell you weapons here or buy materials that you need for your companies. Don't buy items for a high price. Make sure to check what others are selling for and then make a decision. For those of you who know a bit about stock market, check the graph and sell at the peak (usually war times).

6) Skills

Located when you click you level at the top left hand side of your screen, you can select your skills. Make sure to select the ones near the bottom that upgrade your energy, entrepreneurship and production points. This allows you to develop quicker and wait less. After you reach the stage where you unlock your third company and want to create your fourth, then you go to the bottom and expand a company so you can unlock your fourth.

7) Have Fun

We have an insanely strong community. If you don't understand something, feel free to ask. Its recommended you join War Era's discord server because you will get a quicker response. You can also chat to everyone in game by clicking the war button twice and it will be on your left hand side. If you have any remaining questions after this article, ask me in the comments section below or directly message me by clicking my profile and there will be a message button on your top right hand corner. If you want more information on a topic I covered, ask me and ill gladly publish a new article.

Make sure to explore every aspect of the game!

#STRONG_COMMUNITY
items.author: 69ae362f445e36e405fcc236
